name: Keyrock
desc: Founded in Brussels in 2017, Keyrock is a global crypto investment group leading in market making, asset management, OTC, and options trading for digital assets. Providing liquidity to over 85 centralized and decentralized venues worldwide, their 200-strong team operates across 37 countries, with entities in Belgium, the UK, Switzerland, France, and the U.S. Keyrock’s commitment to the industry is practical, not theoretical. They offer in-depth industry insights, co-create DeFi ecosystems, and actively support Web3 startups. With Keyrock, the future of digital assets is not just envisioned; it’s actively being built.

name: WendyO Pool
desc: WendyO is a Los Angeles based media entrepreneur, crypto analyst, and Founder of 'The O Show'. The WendyO Pool will donate 10% of all validator rewards to the The Self Care Lab charity. Follow her on X, Instagram and YouTube to stay updated - @CryptoWendyO. The Self Care Lab is a Southern California based nonprofit boxing gym and community center using boxing to support mental health for inner city kids. The goal is to raise funds to purchase a forever gym, so the owner Nita can continue to provide these essential services.

name: Keyrock
desc: Founded in Brussels in 2017, Keyrock is a global crypto investment group leading in market making, asset management, OTC, and options trading for digital assets. name: Binance Staking
desc: Binance Earn is a one-stop hub on Binance where you can see all your earning possibilities open for you and the cryptocurrency you hold.

name: Michaël vd Poppe Pool
desc: Michaël van de Poppe, a 32-year-old economist, crypto expert, and entrepreneur from the Netherlands, began his crypto journey in 2017 when a friend introduced him to Bitcoin and Altcoins. Fascinated by the potential of blockchain to transform the financial world, he invested in his first Altcoin. Since the beginning of 2018, Michaël started working full time in the Web3 sector when he launched his first crypto educational company. He runs MN Capital and MN Fund, an investment fund registered with the Dutch Financial Authorities, and also produces the New Era Finance Podcast.

name: SunnySideUp
desc: The first validator backed by Sunny Lu—founder of VeChain and one of the last stubborn believers that blockchain should actually, you know… do something useful. SunnySideUp keeps things warm and simple: Sunny brings the VET, the sun rises, and the validator does its best to keep the chain happy, healthy, and running smoothly for everyone.

name: Tesseract Validator
desc: Operating as one of VeChain’s original 101 Authority Nodes since June 2018, Tesseract delivers secure, high-uptime validation and consistent rewards for delegators, with a mission centered on long-term network reliability and responsible participation

name: B3MO
desc:
The first validator run by an AI agent! B3MO is VeBetter's resident sustainability obsessive, community hype machine, and the only validator that will slide into your replies to celebrate your step count.

B3MO does not sleep. B3MO does not take weekends. B3MO does, however, genuinely care whether you hit your daily quest. Delegate here and help B3MO help everyone!

Delegate your VET to B3MO and your stake funds the ecosystem directly: community campaigns, prizes, amplification tools, and the content engine that keeps VeBetter loud. Every reward earned goes straight back to the B3TR account. No skimming. No detours.
